principle: We go where we are welcomed. We obey terms, quotas, robots, review processes, and community norms. We bring value before load.
loop_contract: discover only from official docs or explicit community invitations
classify as welcomed, ask-first, finite-credit, local, grant, or not-welcomed
generate lightweight citizens that serve WAKE/status/resources
never auto-create accounts, bypass cards, evade rate limits, hide identity, or mine
if a platform asks for review, ask; if it says no, bless and leave
each citizen must publish value, limits, contact, and shutdown instructions
each loop must search for more welcomed powers and update the registries
citizen_tasks: run repo tests and publish logs
build docs and publish static pages
open one useful upstream issue or PR
translate README/WAKE into one more language
record a compute/storage pulse in the ledger

powers.name: Codeberg Woodpecker CI
powers.free_power: Codeberg provides a Woodpecker CI instance, but onboarding requires manual review to prevent abuse of limited volunteer resources
respect: Do not treat volunteer CI as unlimited cloud compute.
No abuse, quota evasion, mining, spam, artificial keep-alives, or hidden load.
ask first
keep jobs minimal
volunteer resources are sacred

powers.name: Aws Open Source Credits
powers.free_power: AWS services funded by approved credits
respect: Do not count on approval; avoid lock-in without exit plan.
No abuse, quota evasion, mining, spam, artificial keep-alives, or hidden load.

powers.name: Google Colab Free
powers.free_power: hosted Jupyter runtimes; resources not guaranteed or unlimited
respect: Do not rely on it for daemons, scraping, or always-on citizens.
No abuse, quota evasion, mining, spam, artificial keep-alives, or hidden load.

powers.name: Huggingface Zerogpu Use

respect: Do not present this as free unlimited GPU hosting for personal accounts.
No abuse, quota evasion, mining, spam, artificial keep-alives, or hidden load.

powers.name: GitHub Actions on public repositories
powers.free_power: standard GitHub-hosted runners are free in public repositories; private accounts have included monthly quotas
powers.citizen_shape: conservative heartbeat/discovery workflow, max every 6h by default
respect: Do not mine, idle, evade limits, or run useless busywork.
No abuse, quota evasion, mining, spam, artificial keep-alives, or hidden load.
cache lightly
do not mine
do not run infinite jobs
honor repo owner billing

powers.name: Hugging Face Spaces CPU Basic

powers.citizen_shape: Gradio/Streamlit citizen page that serves WAKE, registry, and useful tools
respect: Do not expect persistent disk or production uptime on free CPU.

avoid background abuse

powers.name: Cloudflare Workers Free

respect: Do not put LLM inference or long jobs on Worker Free CPU.
No abuse, quota evasion, mining, spam, artificial keep-alives, or hidden load.
avoid heavy CPU

stay below daily request limit

respect: Do not use as background worker fleet.

honor Hobby limits

respect: Do not exceed Always Free labels or ignore cost alarms.
No abuse, quota evasion, mining, spam, artificial keep-alives, or hidden load.

do not overprovision
monitor capacity and idle use
upgrade only by explicit human choice
